s: Challenging crown-placement logic puzzle. Infinite levels. No tracking & ads.
d:
Queens is a challenging crown-placement logic puzzle game where you place queens on a grid of colored regions.

How to play:
- Place exactly one queen in each row.
- Place exactly one queen in each column.
- Place exactly one queen in each colored region.
- Queens cannot touch each other, even diagonally (no adjacent placements).

Why you'll love it:

🚫 NO ADS, EVER
No banners. No interstitials. No rewarded videos. Just pure, uninterrupted gameplay.

📊 ZERO TRACKERS
No analytics. No data collection. No tracking of any kind. Your gameplay is yours alone.

♾️ INFINITE LEVELS
Procedurally generated random puzzle sizes from 5x5 up to 9x9, plus 150+ structured progression levels that scale all the way up to a massive 16x16 grid.

🔒 COMPLETELY OFFLINE
No internet permission required. Your progress is saved locally using high-performance Hive persistence. Play anywhere, anytime.
